column1:
Differentiate variables from assignment statements.  
Trace and determine variable values after code execution.  
Write assignment statements to store or update variable values, including assignments with multiple variable expressions.  
Understand that the equals sign (=) in programming represents assignment, not equality.  
Use variables on both sides of an assignment statement to update values (e.g., incrementing a variable).
